description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a single job named "build, test and lint" using the rust:1-bullseye Docker image, marked as interruptible. In the default stage execute the following shell commands in order: apt update -qy; apt install -qy build-essential pkg-config clang libclang-dev libssl-dev gettext zsh; rustup component add clippy; rustup component add rustfmt; ./make-translated-templates; cargo build; cargo clippy --tests --no-deps --workspace; cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo test --all. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
